Container.Name: Vido
Container.Overview: Vido is a NAS media management platform for organizing movies and TV shows with automatic metadata retrieval (TMDb), AI-powered fansub filename parsing, multi-source subtitle search with Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) language detection and OpenCC conversion, and qBittorrent download integration. Built for Taiwanese and Chinese media enthusiasts managing media libraries on NAS devices.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for Vido web interface. The Go API serves both the web UI and API endpoints on this single port.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for SQLite database, cache, and application data.

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Directory for database backups and metadata exports.

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Path to your media library on the host. Mounted read-only. Example: /mnt/user/media

Config.Name: TMDb API Key
Config.Description: API key from themoviedb.org for fetching movie and TV show metadata, posters, and images. Get yours at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

Config.Name: TMDb Language
Config.Description: Default language for TMDb metadata. Use ISO 639-1 format: zh-TW (Traditional Chinese), zh-CN (Simplified Chinese), en-US (English).

Config.Name: Gin Mode
Config.Description: Gin framework mode. Use 'release' for production (less logging, better performance) or 'debug' for troubleshooting.

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: AI provider for filename parsing: 'gemini' (Google) or 'claude' (Anthropic). Requires the corresponding API key below.

Config.Name: Gemini API Key
Config.Description: Google Gemini API key for AI-powered fansub filename parsing. Get yours at https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey

Config.Name: Claude API Key
Config.Description: Anthropic Claude API key (alternative to Gemini). Get yours at https://console.anthropic.com/
